mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendations (`쉼표번호`, diagnosis_result_id, place_id, criteria, clicked, saved, recommended_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{diagnosisResultId}, #{placeId}, #{criteria}, #{clicked}, #{saved}, #{recommendedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.`쉼표번호`, r.diagnosis_result_id, r.place_id, r.criteria, r.clicked, r.saved, r.recommended_at, p.name AS place_name, p.address AS place_address, p.latitude AS place_latitude, p.longitude AS place_longitude, (SELECT photo_url FROM place_photos WHERE place_id = p.id LIMIT 1) AS place_photo_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_reviews WHERE place_id = p.id) AS place_review_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM place_bookmarks WHERE place_id = p.id) AS place_bookmark_count, (SELECT rest_type FROM place_tags WHERE place_id = p.id LIMIT 1) AS place_first_rest_type, p.difficulty AS place_difficulty FROM recommendations r LEFT JOIN places p ON r.place_id = p.id WHERE r.`쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY r.recommended_at DESC LIMIT 9
mapper.update: UPDATE recommendations SET clicked = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE recommendations SET saved = #{saved} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.`쉼표번호`, r.diagnosis_result_id, r.place_id, r.criteria, r.clicked, r.saved, r.recommended_at, p.name AS place_name, p.address AS place_address, p.latitude AS place_latitude, p.longitude AS place_longitude FROM recommendations r LEFT JOIN places p ON r.place_id = p.id WHERE r.`쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY r.recommended_at DESC

SELECT rt.type_name AS rest_type, AVG(rl.emotion_after - rl.emotion_before) AS avg_improvement FROM rest_logs rl JOIN rest_types rt ON rl.rest_type_id = rt.id WHERE rl.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo} AND rl.deleted = 0 AND rl.emotion_before IS NOT NULL AND rl.emotion_after IS NOT NULL AND rl.start_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY rt.id, rt.type_name

SELECT rt.type_name AS rest_type, AVG(rl.emotion_after - rl.emotion_before) AS avg_improvement, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM rest_logs rl JOIN rest_types rt ON rl.rest_type_id = rt.id WHERE rl.`쉼표번호` != #{commaNo} AND rl.deleted = 0 AND rl.emotion_before IS NOT NULL AND rl.emotion_after IS NOT NULL AND rl.start_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND rl.`쉼표번호` IN ( /* 나와 같은 유형을 2개 이상 사용한 유사 사용자 */ SELECT rl2.`쉼표번호` FROM rest_logs rl2 JOIN rest_types rt2 ON rl2.rest_type_id = rt2.id WHERE rl2.`쉼표번호` != #{commaNo} AND rl2.deleted = 0 AND rl2.start_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND rt2.type_name IN ( /* 내가 최근 90일간 사용한 유형 목록 */ SELECT DISTINCT rt3.type_name FROM rest_logs rl3 JOIN rest_types rt3 ON rl3.rest_type_id = rt3.id WHERE rl3.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo} AND rl3.deleted = 0 AND rl3.start_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) ) GROUP BY rl2.`쉼표번호` HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT rt2.type_name) >= 2 ) GROUP BY rt.id, rt.type_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3 ORDER BY avg_improvement DESC

SELECT rt.type_name AS rest_type, AVG(rl.emotion_after - rl.emotion_before) AS avg_improvement FROM rest_logs rl JOIN rest_types rt ON rl.rest_type_id = rt.id WHERE rl.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo} AND rl.deleted = 0 AND rl.emotion_before IS NOT NULL AND rl.emotion_after IS NOT NULL AND (DAYOFWEEK(rl.start_time) - 1) = #{dayOfWeek} AND ( (#{timeSlot} = 'morning' AND HOUR(rl.start_time) BETWEEN 6 AND 11) OR (#{timeSlot} = 'afternoon' AND HOUR(rl.start_time) BETWEEN 12 AND 17) OR (#{timeSlot} = 'evening' AND HOUR(rl.start_time) BETWEEN 18 AND 21) OR (#{timeSlot} = 'night' AND (HOUR(rl.start_time) >= 22 OR HOUR(rl.start_time) <= 5)) ) GROUP BY rt.id, rt.type_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY avg_improvement DESC LIMIT 3
